content.body:
New cli/internal/cmd/doctor.go hosts the expanded doctor command with flags:
- --verbose: memory breakdowns by confidence, promotion_state, classification
- --telemetry-preview: event counts from today's JSONL + most recent sample
- --landmarks: top landmark memories at current scope (empty until #65 ships)
- --bundle: redacted diagnostic bundle to stdout only (no file, no upload)

Removed the old runDoctor from ops.go (helpers kept and shared). Dropped
duplicate shortenPath from promote.go (single definition in doctor.go).

Help text explicitly states the transparency promise: "No network calls;
this command reads only local files."

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(doctor): unified diagnostic + telemetry preview + bundle + landmarks (#70)
